item.title: [工具] Application
item.description: OS Windows USB/DVD Download Tool ：https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/download/details.aspx?id=56485 https://download.microsoft.com/download/C/4/8/C48F6E20-FE20-41C6-8C1C-408FE7B49A3A/Windows7-USB-DVD-Download-Tool-Installer-en-US.exe Rufus ：https://github.com/pbatard/rufus https://github.com/pbatard/rufus/releases/download/v3.8/rufus-3.8p.exe Etcher ：https://github.com/resin-io/etcher https://github.com/resin-io/etcher/releases/download/v1.4.4/Etcher-Portable-1.4.4-x86.exe 7z ：https://www.7-zip.org/dow
